inputs.label: standard
inputs.character: A man in his early 30s, South Asian, close-cropped black hair, wire-rimmed glasses, lean build, always wears a dark green field jacket over a plain white t-shirt. Carries a small leather notebook. Expression: alert, curious, slightly skeptical.
scenes: Walking through a city street at night
Standing in front of a whiteboard covered in notes

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.character: A woman in her 50s, grey bob haircut, sharp cheekbones, black turtleneck

inputs.label: european
inputs.character: A non-binary person in their late 20s, pale complexion, short auburn hair with an undercut, visible small earring in left ear, slim build, consistently wears a charcoal wool overcoat over a dark roll-neck sweater. Expression: thoughtful, composed, slightly melancholic. Designed as the visual persona for a podcast about European art-house cinema.
inputs.style: Illustrated, semi-realistic — European graphic novel aesthetic, Moebius influence
scenes: Sitting in a cinema watching a film
Walking along a canal in Amsterdam at dusk
Reading in a cafe with large windows
